description: You are a BIM Coordinator resolving a clash in a federated model. In the coordination model '/home/ga/BIMProjects/clash_model.ifc', resolve the geometric clash between the 'IfcDuctSegment' named 'Duct-Main' and the 'IfcBeam' named 'Beam-Primary' by moving 'Duct-Main' down by exactly 500mm (Z-axis, -0.5m) while maintaining its X and Y positions. Add a Property Set named 'Pset_Coordination' to the duct element with a String property named 'Status' set to 'Resolved'. Export the updated model to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/clash_model_resolved.ifc'.
